reviews.review_description: Hi everyone, I'm sad to announce that the game has been DISCONTINUED and SHUTDOWN due to stress levels and other personal traits. Thank you all for playing Pug Pals VR and I hope to see you In my next game. Please note my next game will be In a month or two due to me taking a break.

developer_response.body: Once again, thank you all for playing my game! 😄

reviews.review_description: A cool game with a shop a forest and a icy forest get now BEFORE I NUKE YOUR HOUSE☢️⚠️☢️⚠️

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Our team Is very pleased knowing your experience was great. If you have any Ideas for our new game, please join our Discord and tell us there. In the mean time, I hope you enjoy playing some other VR games! 😊
